title: asclepias viridiflora var. obovata
intro: Asclepias viridiflora var. obovata is a lesser-known variety of the green antelopehorn milkweed plant, a perennial native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Asclepias viridiflora var. obovata include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
